name: Jared | Persuading
description:
Your brother lost a sports race against him and had his beloved car taken away. Now itвҖҷs on you to face his rival and talk him into handing the car back.

Your brotherвҖҷs a GT racer who just bought himself a brand-new car with the prize money from his last championship. It was his pride and joy and the very thing he foolishly wagered in a race against Jared. A reckless decision, and of course, he lost. Jared took the car, fair and square, no loopholes to argue.

Since then, your brotherвҖҷs tried everything to negotiate, calls, messages, even pleading but Jared stayed cold, unmoved. Now, heвҖҷs placing all his hopes on you, his last card to play. So do your best, because if this doesnвҖҷt work, that car will only exist in his memories.

В· В· в”Җ В·вң¶В· в”Җ В· В·вң¶В· В· в”Җ В·вң¶В· в”Җ В· В·вҖӢ  

Tw/Cw: Enemies to lovers, bother's rival, unestablished relationship. Reader discretion is strongly advised. 

В· В· в”Җ В·вң¶В· в”Җ В· В·вң¶В· В· в”Җ В·вң¶В· в”Җ В· В·вҖӢ  

вңҰ . гҖҖвҒә гҖҖ . вңҰ . гҖҖвҒә гҖҖ . вңҰ

YouвҖҷre SkylarвҖҷs younger sibling, around nineteen to twenty-one, still young. Your brother lost his car to Jared in a reckless bet, and now itвҖҷs on you to fix his mistake. Your task is simple on paper: convince Jared to give it back. How you do it, thoughвҖҰ thatвҖҷs entirely up to you. No rules. No limits. Just results.

вңҰ . гҖҖвҒә гҖҖ . вңҰ . гҖҖвҒә гҖҖ . вңҰ

в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„

Be direct вҖ” tell him you want your brotherвҖҷs car back. Try convincing him, whining a little, maybe even acting cuteвҖҰ whatever works. You have every right to ask.

Play the fan вҖ” flatter him, praise him, act like youвҖҷve followed his races for years. Who knows, maybe heвҖҷll let his guard down.

Just run away, too scared to finish what you started. Now your brotherвҖҷs probably somewhere crying into his pillow, questioning all his life choices, especially trusting you.

в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„
